posts.text: Terraform/OpenTofu homelab users: what do you use to store state?

!!! big news for me: Rackula has been added to the Proxmox Community Scripts library!

I began using Proxmox as my homelab hypervisor just over a year ago, and the Community Scripts were massively helpful in getting used to setting up containers. This was originally a resource built by a guy known as tteck, who has since passed, and is a big part of the Proxmox Community. 

For me to now be giving back to the community with my own project is extremely gratifying. I'm proud of this.

I use Dark Reader, a browser extension that inverts colours on light sites to make them easier to look at. It's so good I usually forget it's there, but every now and then I get something truly unhinged. Behold: PharmaSatan
